rawText:
KEROLOS ATEF ADLY
Address: El-Zaytoun, Cairo, Egypt 61111                           phone: +201220714614
Email: kerolos.a.adly@gmail.com                                LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/kerolosatefadly
MECHATRONICS ENGINEER (Industrial automation systems)
WORK EXPERIENCE
• Mechatronics Engineer
TR. Tesla Company | New Minia, Egypt | 2023 – 11.2025
Initially joined as a trainee before graduation and was later hired full-time. Responsible
for maintaining and troubleshooting production lines, installing and wiring control panels,
programming PLCs, and setting up capacitor banks for power-factor correction.
Currently working on integrating mobile applications with production systems using my
Flutter development skills to improve monitoring and automation efficiency.
• Flutter Mobile Application Developer
Xzone-EG | 2022 – 2023
Freelance | 2023 – Present
Developed and maintained cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter. Designed
user-friendly interfaces, optimized app performance, and collaborated with clients to
deliver customized solutions for various business needs.
• Smart Home Engineer & Installation Supervisor
CASA for smart solutions | 2020 – 2022 | Minia, Egypt
 Installed and configured smart home systems, including automation controllers,
sensors, and lighting systems. Supervised on-site installations and ensured smooth
integration of control panels and network components.
• Production & Maintenance Engineer for production line
Nageh Tex Factory | The third industrial zone, 10th of Ramadan | 11.2025 – Present
As the Maintenance Manager, I oversee the full operation of a velvet raising production
line consisting of 15 industrial machines. I manage daily production workflow, ensure
minimal downtime, and handle all electrical and mechanical maintenance. My role
includes troubleshooting, implementing preventive maintenance programs, optimizing
machine performance, and supervising operators and technicians while maintaining high
safety and quality standards.
ABOUT ME
Mechatronics Engineer specialized in industrial automation and mobile application
development, with hands-on experience in PLC programming, production line
maintenance, and smart systems integration. Skilled in Flutter development and
passionate about combining software with automation to improve efficiency and smart
manufacturing solutions.

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
Languages: 
      Arabic (Native)
      English: (very good)
Certifications: 
      PLC Programming – HA Consulting Group - Cairo
      Electric Motor & Drive Programming – HA Consulting Group - Cairo
      Classic Control – HA Consulting Group - Cairo
      Smart Home & Automation Systems - ETA ACADEMY - Cairo
COURSES AND ACHIEVEMENTS
Control Fundamentals and PLC Basics – HA Group - Cairo
Smart home course - ETA academy - Cairo
Training course - MV premolded cable - Elsewedy Electric
Won first place in the Line Follower Competition from the Chinese University of
Technology in Beni Suef
Volunteer in “futur
